sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51830" key="kaqilareu/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καθῐλᾰρ-εύομαι</orth>, c. gen., and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καθῐλᾰρ-ύνω</orth>, c. dat., sine expl., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
